task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LimeSurvey Email Templates section, under the 'Invitation' tab, the Subject field must contain exactly 'Your Feedback Matters: 2024 SIOP Annual Conference Survey'.

In the 'Invitation' tab, the email body must include: 'Dear {FIRSTNAME} {LASTNAME},', a thank you for attending the 2024 SIOP Annual Conference in Chicago, 'Please complete our brief survey by clicking the link below:', '{SURVEYURL}', 'This survey will take approximately 10 minutes to complete.', 'Dr. Elena Voss, Conference Program Chair', and '{OPTOUTURL}'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Reminder Email subject and body
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Reminder' tab, the Subject must be 'Reminder: We Still Need Your Conference Feedback - Closing Soon'. The body must include: 'Dear {FIRSTNAME},', 'We noticed you haven't yet completed our conference feedback survey.', 'The survey will close in 72 hours', '{SURVEYURL}', and '{OPTOUTURL}'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Confirmation Email subject and body
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Confirmation' tab, the Subject must be 'Thank You for Your 2024 SIOP Conference Feedback'. The body must include: 'Dear {FIRSTNAME},', 'Your responses have been successfully recorded.', and 'Your input will directly shape the program for SIOP 2025.'

task_completion.description: Set the Administrator email in General Settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey's General Settings page, the 'Administrator email' field must be set to 'conferences@siop-feedback.org'.

task_completion.description: Set the Bounce email in General Settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey's General Settings page, the 'Bounce email' field must be set to 'bounce@siop-feedback.org'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface in a web browser, not using curl, API scripts, or terminal commands to update the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent edited the correct survey
integrity.visual_evidence: The top header or breadcrumbs in LimeSurvey should indicate the agent is editing the '2024 SIOP Annual Conference Feedback' survey.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the required text into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The text must be entered into the actual LimeSurvey input fields (Subject lines, WYSIWYG editors for email bodies, and General Settings fields), not a notepad or blank document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey title is exactly '2024 SIOP Annual Conference Feedback'. The conference referenced is the real 2024 SIOP Annual Conference in Chicago. However, 'Dr. Elena Voss' is a synthetic persona created for this task, and the email addresses 'conferences@siop-feedback.org' and 'bounce@siop-feedback.org' are fabricated for testing purposes. The required strings provided in the prompt are exact specifications for the email templates.
